data_encryption.applies_to: All client PII, booking data, phone numbers, service records
data_encryption.verification: Every data write hashed and integrity-checked

proxy_infra.ranges: 15 maritime ISP subnets (Eastlink, Bell Aliant, Rogers, Seaside, CityWest)

compliance.canada: PIPEDA — Personal Information Protection and Electronic Documents Act
compliance.ns_specific: Nova Scotia Personal Information International Disclosure Protection Act
compliance.advertising: Canadian Code of Advertising Standards — clarity on sponsored content
compliance.health: Nova Scotia Health Authority — foot care scope of practice guidelines

identity_protection.agent_authentication: Zero-trust — every action logged, scoped, auditable
identity_protection.client_pii: Not stored in agent memory — booking data encrypted at rest
identity_protection.phone_numbers: Hashed client phone on storage, decrypted only at booking view

breach_response.detection: Real-time anomaly detection on proxy traffic patterns
breach_response.containment: Auto-quarantine compromised agent → rotate IP → retrain
breach_response.recovery: 3-layer backup — all data recoverable within 60 seconds
